title: Simply Houses
description: A simple mod that generates houses to enhance your worlds
body:
**Simply Houses** is a mod that generates a bunch of simple structures, meant to serve as early-game accomodation or as a way to enhance your worlds. These structures are mostly passive and often include useful loot.

Current version adds 10 different structures, as follows: forest_chapel, forest_house, forest_stonemason, forest_fort, taiga_house, taiga_woodcutter, taiga_forge, taiga_inn, plains_house, plains_mansion.

We've also got cake.
